entry.title: New GWAC NNG07DA23B awarded to MERLIN INTERNATIONAL INCORPORATED for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: SEWP 4 AWARD CLASS 6THE SEWP CONTRACTS OFFER A WIDE RANGE OF ADVANCED TECHNOLOGY INCLUDING UNIX-, LINUX-, AND WINDOWS-BASED DESKTOPS AND SERVERS, ALONG WITH PERIPHERALS, NETWORK EQUIPMENT, STORAGE DEVICES, SECURITY TOOLS, SOFTWARE, AND OTHER IT PRODUCTS AND PRODUCT BASED SOLUTIONS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:extentCompeted.description: FULL AND OPEN COMPETITION AFTER EXCLUSION OF SOURCES
